calls.comment: GW_CharacterStat::petLockerSN (DecodeBuffer 24 bytes = 3 × int64; atlas for-loop body collapses to 1 static entry)
ipv4 (4 octets — WriteByteArray in atlas, Decode4 in client; same wire bytes)
world status (2 bytes — v95 reads as 2 × Decode1; atlas writes WriteShort, wire-equivalent)
nWorldID terminator (0xFF dispatch — end of world list)
render flag (literal 1u in MakeVACDlg; ResetVAC sends 0; opcode 0x0F)
characterId — read before dispatching to OnAttack/OnHit/OnMove/etc.
passive SLV byte (only if skillId==3211006 and SLV!=0)
passive skill ID (only if skillId==3211006 and passive SLV!=0)
monsterId per damage target (loop nDamagePerMob times)
damage count (only if meso explosion skill 4211006, per target)
damage value per hit (loop nHits times, or damage-count for meso explosion)
v20: power guard flag (only if nAttackIdx > -2)
mobId for power guard (only if v20 != 0)
stance source (only if mob found for power guard)
power guard hit x (only if mob found)
power guard hit y (only if mob found)
v4: stance action (always, after power guard block, if nAttackIdx > -2)
v33: stance flags, bit0=bStance, bit1=bStanceSkillOverride (if nAttackIdx > -2)
nMasterLevel (per entry, for skills needing master level)
nChangedStatPoint (only present when IsMovementAffectingStat(mask) is true)
characterId — read by CUserPool::OnUserRemotePacket before dispatch
characterId — read by CUserPool::OnUserRemotePacket before dispatch (foreign path); absent on self-effect opcode
nMode — sub-op byte dispatching to 16+ effect branches (case 0..15+); sub-op enum not modeled by pipeline
characterId — read by CUserPool::OnUserRemotePacket before dispatch
v4 flags byte: bit0=avatarLook, bit1=speed, bit2=carryItem
AvatarLook::Decode — full avatar look data (guard: v4 & 1)
liCoupleItemSN (8 bytes) + liPairItemSN (8 bytes) + dwPairCharacterId (4 bytes)
liFriendshipItemSN (8 bytes) + liFriendshipPairItemSN (8 bytes) + dwFriendCharacterId (4 bytes)
rankEnabled / hasRank byte (Decode1(v3) in v95 loop)
rank buffer 16 bytes: worldRank + worldRankGap + jobRank + jobRankGap
code byte (case 2/3/6/7 = error — no further reads in v95)
characterId (consumed by CUserPool::OnUserRemotePacket dispatcher, case 222 = 0xDE, before calling this function)
characterId (consumed by CUserPool::OnUserCommonPacket dispatcher, case 183 = 0xB7, before calling this function)
notAtPoint flag (0=use explicit x,y; non-zero=use avatar position)
v7 (pet count; if >0: SetMultiPetInfo reads pets in bool-terminated loop)
chair list count (ZArray<long>::_Alloc + DecodeBuffer with 4 * count bytes)
sitting flag (0=cancel sit / stand up, 1=sit in chair)

result code (0=success; error codes: 6=system error, 9=unknown, 10=too many connections, 18=?, 20=secondary pin mismatch, 22=guild master, 24=engaged, 26=nexon id mismatch, 29=has family, 35/36=other errors)

mode/sub-op byte (0=drop pick-up, 1=quest record, 2=cash item expire, 3=inc EXP, 4=inc SP, 5=inc fame/POP, 6=inc meso, 7=inc GP, 8=give buff, 9=general item expire, 10=system message, 11=quest record ex, 12=item protect expire, 13=item expire replace, 14=skill expire)
characterId — consumed by CUserPool::OnUserCommonPacket dispatcher (case 186 = 0xBA) before calling this function
bEnchantSkill (true = Vega/enchant scroll category; false = normal scroll)
nEnchantCategory (enchant category type; 0 for normal scrolls; passed to CUIEnchantDlg::SetResult)
v5 (lucky/white-scroll display flag; selects 'Lucky Day' vs 'Scroll of Goodness' string)
v6 (enchant result flag; passed to CUIEnchantDlg::SetResult; 0 for normal scrolls)
resetToDefault flag (non-zero = reset to defaults; zero = read key bindings from packet)
FUNCKEY_MAPPED::nType (key type byte; loop 90 entries, only if resetToDefault==0 and packet length >= 0x1BD)
FUNCKEY_MAPPED::nID (key action int32; loop 90 entries, only if resetToDefault==0)
m_nPetConsumeItemID (HP auto-pot item ID; 0 = use config default)
m_nPetConsumeMPItemID (MP auto-pot item ID; 0 = use config default)

movement: CMovePath::Encode — Encode2(x)+Encode2(y)+Encode2(vx)+Encode2(vy)+Encode1(elemCount)+per-elem(nAttr+coords+bMoveAction+tElapse)+Encode1(keyPadStateCount)+keyPadStates+Encode2(rcMove.left/top/right/bottom); tool cannot linearize loop — ack:tool-limitation
nSkillID (skill to cancel; remapped for Aran/Evan aliases)
bByItemOption (1 = triggered by item option, 0 = normal)
count (number of changed key slot indices); per-entry: Encode4(keyId) + Encode1(nType) + Encode4(nID) via FUNCKEY_MAPPED::Encode@0x4f6d80
